## Release v9.9.9

Auto-assembled by /sulis:release-train. This is a FIXTURE release-PR
body used by the auto-back-merge test suite (WP-009) to exercise the
pin-read path. The HTML comment at the bottom is the canonical
`dev-sha-at-open` pin, written in the exact format
`/sulis:release-train` Step 5 produces (ADR-005):

  printf '\n\n<!-- dev-sha-at-open: %s -->\n' "$DEV_SHA"
